summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fiscal Tax Canarie app. Backend API mostly functional with 91.7% success rate. Frontend registration/authentication working but some integration issues found.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when accessed
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks frontend deadline calendar and status updates

integration_issues.flow: Frontend login with predefined accountant credentials
integration_issues.issue: Login form submission not redirecting to dashboard despite backend API working
integration_issues.workaround: Backend API login works correctly via direct calls

integration_issues.flow: Tax models display in client dashboard
integration_issues.issue: Modelli tributari not displaying in client dashboard despite API returning 8 models
500 error prevents deadline data from loading in dashboards
console_errors: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500

passed_tests: ✅ Registration only creates client accounts (no commercialista option)
✅ API modelli-tributari returns 8 predefined tax models
✅ Stats API shows deadline counts by status (da_fare, in_lavorazione, completata, scaduta)
✅ Landing page teal section (bg-teal-500) has white text
✅ Registration page has no role selector (client-only)
✅ Client registration and dashboard redirect working
✅ Teal buttons have white text throughout the UI
✅ Client dashboard has 'Guida Modelli Tributari' tab
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix /api/deadlines endpoint returning 500 error - this blocks deadline functionality in both client and commercial dashboards. Also investigate frontend login flow integration issue preventing proper dashboard redirection for accountant login.

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (key features work but some integration issues)
